page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8v.48xlarge is an enterprise-class bare-metal GPU-accelerated server instance. It features 192 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8469C processors running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 5.33 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance integrates eight GPUs with a combined total of 768 GB of VRAM. There is no local NVMe storage bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 170 Gbps.

Given the high density of dedicated Intel Xeon cores and massive GPU memory, this instance represents a high-resource hardware profile. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale parallel processing tasks where resource consolidation on a single bare-metal node reduces network overhead. Appropriate workloads include large language model training, complex deep learning inference, high-performance computing, and massive data science pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8v.48xlarge is a high-performance, bare-metal server designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. Powered by an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8469C processor, it delivers 192 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.6 GHz. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory and features eight integrated GPUs providing a total of 768 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions, but offers a high-speed network interface with 170 Gbps of baseline bandwidth. This hardware configuration is optimized for resource-intensive parallel computing tasks, making it highly suitable for deep learning model training, large-scale AI inference, and high-performance computing applications.

tagline: A bare-metal accelerator platform featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated cores and eight GPUs with seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of VRAM.
bullet_points: One hundred ninety-two dedicated Intel Xeon 8469C physical cores running at 2.6 GHz.
Eight integrated GPUs delivering a combined total of 768 GB of VRAM.
One thousand twenty-four gigabytes of system memory.
One hundred seventy gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage configurations.
Optimized for deep learning training, large-scale AI inference, and high-performance computing.
